title: Minecraft: Odyssey
description: Embark on an RPG adventure with new weapons, vibrant biomes, fascinating creatures, and a world teeming with possibilities.
body:
![Title Logo Cut](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/77f1278d1d30fa9da15a882cb62a89dbe1b5ac3b.png)

---

**Experience a complete overhaul of Minecraft, with new mechanics, mobs, items, structures, and more.**

**Minecraft: Odyssey** transforms the familiar world of Minecraft, introducing reworked combat, new animations, large ships, weapons, and more to create an immersive RPG experience. Embark on thrilling adventures, conquer challenging dungeons, and explore a world brimming with possibilities.

When creating **Minecraft: Odyssey**, we aimed to preserve the core gameplay experience of Vanilla Minecraft, adding new content and mechanics that enhance the adventure rather than drastically altering it. We carefully selected mods that expand the world and possibilities without fundamentally changing the way the game feels.
